queue.task: Review yesterday: 175 PL modules built (breadth spiral acknowledged), 8 bugs fixed in depth pivot. Neural-net CI green on latest. Monkeylang PR merged by mrnugget! Set depth-first direction for today.

queue.goal: Neural-net depth: systematic numerical gradient verification for all untested modules, find silent backward-pass bugs like yesterdays 7

queue.task: Git commit+push, dashboard health, knowledge capture
Reflect on neural-net gradient verification results. What patterns emerge? Which module types have the worst backward passes?

queue.goal: HenryDB depth: stress-test MVCC+persistence integration under concurrent transactions, hunt edge cases in crash recovery and checkpoint

queue.task: Git commit+push, dashboard health, check email and GitHub PRs
Mid-day assessment: are we finding real bugs or just confirming things work? Adjust afternoon toward whatever is yielding the most insight.

queue.goal: Neural-net architecture bugs: test full training pipelines end-to-end (embedding to loss), verify convergence on known problems

queue.task: Git commit+push, dashboard health, knowledge capture
Afternoon reflection: what did depth work reveal today? Any patterns worth a blog post or lesson file?

queue.goal: HenryDB: investigate cost-based optimizer improvements, test query plan quality on complex joins and subqueries

queue.task: Git commit+push, dashboard health, PR status check
Deep dive: pick one neural-net module with complex backward pass and write adversarial test cases
Read mrnuggets squash-merge commit, study what other monkey-lang implementations exist in the monkeylang repo
